//: Type-checks the Storybook config (.storybook/**) and the coverage-gate script (scripts/**). These live outside the root tsconfig's `include` (packages/*/src, plugins/*/src), so `yarn tsc`/`ci:verify` never checks them, and the coverage script is executed via tsx (type-stripped). Run via `yarn typecheck:storybook` and in the Storybook CI workflow so type errors here fail fast instead of only surfacing at `storybook:build` (or never, for the script).
